summary: Build a financial model with three-statement integration, assumption documentation, scenario analysis, and sensitivity tables.

inputs.name: model_requirements
inputs.description: Model type, purpose, time horizon, and granularity requirements.

inputs.name: historical_data
inputs.description: Historical financial statements for base period.

inputs.name: assumption_set
inputs.description: Key assumptions for revenue, costs, capital, and financing.

outputs.name: financial_model
outputs.description: Integrated three-statement model with linked schedules.

outputs.name: assumption_documentation
outputs.description: Complete assumption log with sources and rationale.

outputs.name: sensitivity_analysis
outputs.description: Sensitivity tables for key variables and scenario outputs.

budget.notes: High-stakes workflow. Preserve assumption documentation and reviewer handoff.

gates.rule: Confirm the task is financial model building and not tax, legal, or investment advice.
Require model requirements, historical data, and assumptions before model construction begins.
Mark all model outputs as decision support and attach disclaimer before external sharing.
End with named human reviewer handoff; do not claim model accuracy guarantees.

steps.action: Define model structure, time periods, and linking logic for three-statement integration.
Document all assumptions with sources, build assumption schedule, and link to projections.
Build integrated income statement, balance sheet, and cash flow statement with circular references resolved.
Build sensitivity tables for key variables and scenario analysis for base, upside, and downside cases.

tools.name: filesystem.read
tools.purpose: Read historical financial data and assumption inputs.

tools.name: filesystem.write
tools.purpose: Write the financial model and documentation when requested.

verification.method: Check all three statements are linked and balance.
Check every material assumption has a source and rationale.
Check output includes disclaimer and named reviewer handoff.

success_criteria: The model integrates all three financial statements with proper linking.
All material assumptions are documented with sources and rationale.
The final output explicitly states it is decision support and requires human review before operational use.

rollback.when: If the model does not balance or assumptions are undocumented, revert to the relevant step.
